name: American Megatrends International, LLC
h1: American Megatrends International's GCC footprint in India
lede: American Megatrends International runs three centers across three Indian cities. Chennai, Coimbatore and Kolkata, covering R&D and CoE, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one American Megatrends International office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: American Megatrends International GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: American Megatrends International runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Chennai, Coimbatore, Kolkata), covering R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: American Megatrends International's India footprint covers Chennai, Coimbatore and Kolkata, spanning R&D and CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 71 decision-makers, in one profile.
